notes: Class 10 Surface Areas and Volumes — emphasis on combined solids and frustum, common board question type. 3 items, 4 chunks each.

items.subject: math
items.concept: calculating surface area of cylinder + hemisphere or cone + cylinder shapes

items.subject: math
items.concept: volume = (1/3) pi h (r1^2 + r2^2 + r1 r2); slant height

items.subject: math
items.concept: volume conservation when one solid is melted and recast into another
